tell: Probes early and often, backs off when you enforce, and only goes to war if your denial is visibly weak. Responsive to demonstrated resolve; indifferent to reassurance.
Internal pressure rises every turn — a closing window of opportunity. Deterrence must be established EARLY; late resolve is discounted as the window narrows. Reassurance barely helps.

Arms in reaction to threat, not appetite. Offensive-coded build-ups and mobilizations feed a spiral; reassurance and defensive denial cool it. Punishing postures can manufacture the very war they aim to prevent.
